query: SELECT MIN(period) as min_period, MAX(period) as max_period, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN period IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_period, SUM(CASE WHEN period = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_period FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT MIN(period) as min_period, MAX(period) as max_period, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN period IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_period, SUM(CASE WHEN period = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_period FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
